base_url.description: FireHydrant API root. Defaults to https://api.firehydrant.io/v1. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

api_token.description: FireHydrant API token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_token>.

page_size.description: Number of records requested per page (per_page). Between 1 and 200.
